hubFunctions.name: fromSecret
hubFunctions.signature: func fromSecret(ns string, secretName string, datakey string) (dataValue string, err error)

params.name: ns
params.description: Namespace. On the hub side, must match the policy namespace.

params.name: datakey
params.description: Key inside the Secret's data map.

returns.description: Data value. On the hub, the output is automatically encrypted via protect before propagation.

hubFunctions.description: Returns the value of the given data key in the Secret. Hub-side output is auto-encrypted using protect.

hubFunctions.name: fromConfigMap
hubFunctions.signature: func fromConfigMap(ns string, configmapName string, datakey string) (dataValue string, err Error)

params.name: ns
params.description: Namespace. On the hub side, must match the policy namespace.

returns.description: Empty string if the data key does not exist.

hubFunctions.description: Returns the value of the given data key in the ConfigMap.

hubFunctions.name: fromClusterClaim
hubFunctions.signature: func fromClusterClaim(clusterclaimName string) (dataValue string, err Error)

returns.description: Spec.Value from the ClusterClaim. Errors if the ClusterClaim does not exist.

hubFunctions.description: Returns the value of Spec.Value in the ClusterClaim resource. Produces a policy violation if the ClusterClaim does not exist.

hubFunctions.name: lookupClusterClaim

returns.description: Empty string if the ClusterClaim does not exist (no error, unlike fromClusterClaim).

hubFunctions.description: Like fromClusterClaim but returns an empty string if the ClusterClaim is missing, allowing callers to branch with default.

hubFunctions.name: lookup
hubFunctions.signature: func lookup(apiversion string, kind string, namespace string, name string, labelselector ...string) (value string, err Error)

params.name: namespace
params.description: On the hub side, restricted to the policy namespace.

returns.description: Resource as a JSON-compatible map; empty map if not found. Pipe through | default dict for nil-safety before further pipeline ops.

hubFunctions.description: Generic lookup of a Kubernetes resource. Use default so the correct type is passed to later template functions.

hubFunctions.name: base64enc
hubFunctions.description: Returns a base64-encoded value of the input data string.

hubFunctions.name: base64dec
hubFunctions.description: Returns a base64-decoded value of the input string.

hubFunctions.name: indent
hubFunctions.signature: func indent(spaces int, data string) (padded-data string)
hubFunctions.description: Returns the data string padded with a specific number of leading spaces on each line.

hubFunctions.name: autoindent
hubFunctions.description: Like indent, but automatically determines the number of leading spaces from the column of the template directive. Required when interpolating multi-line values such as toYaml output.

hubFunctions.name: toInt
hubFunctions.description: Casts the input to its integer value. Must be the last function in the pipeline so YAML interprets the result as an integer rather than a string.

hubFunctions.name: toBool
hubFunctions.description: Converts the input string to a boolean. Must be the last function in the pipeline so YAML interprets the result as a boolean.

hubFunctions.name: fromYaml
hubFunctions.description: Parses a YAML string into a Golang object. Also available as fromYAML. Typically used against ConfigMap values that carry YAML content.

hubFunctions.name: toYaml
hubFunctions.description: Serializes a Golang object to a YAML string. Also available as toYAML. For multi-line results to indent correctly, pipe through autoindent or indent.

hubFunctions.name: fromYAML
hubFunctions.description: Alias for fromYaml. Parses a YAML string into a Golang object.

hubFunctions.name: toYAML
hubFunctions.description: Alias for toYaml. Serializes a Golang object to a YAML string.

hubFunctions.name: protect

returns.description: Value encrypted with AES-CBC 256-bit per-managed-cluster key, prefixed with $ocm_encrypted:. Auto-decrypted on the managed cluster at policy evaluation.

hubFunctions.description: Hub-only. Encrypts a string in a hub cluster policy template. Used with syntax '| protect hub' at the end of a pipeline. Encryption keys rotate every 30 days.

hubFunctions.name: toLiteral

returns.description: Emits the value without surrounding quotation marks, allowing structured content (numbers, bools, lists, maps) to be interpolated into YAML.

hubFunctions.description: Removes outer quotation marks from the template result, converting a JSON-encoded string to a YAML-native value in the manifest.

hubFunctions.name: copySecretData
hubFunctions.signature: func copySecretData(namespace string, name string) (data map[string]string)

returns.description: All keys in the Secret's data field. Auto-encrypted via protect when used in a hub template.

hubFunctions.description: Copies all of the data contents of the specified Secret.

hubFunctions.name: copyConfigMapData
hubFunctions.signature: func copyConfigMapData(namespace string, name string) (data map[string]string)
hubFunctions.description: Copies all of the data content of the specified ConfigMap.

hubFunctions.name: getNodesWithExactRoles

returns.description: Nodes that carry the specified role label and only that role (ignoring node-role.kubernetes.io/worker).

hubFunctions.description: Returns a list of nodes with only the role you specify. Ignores nodes that carry additional roles except node-role.kubernetes.io/worker.

hubFunctions.name: hasNodesWithExactRoles
hubFunctions.description: Returns true if the cluster contains any nodes with only the specified role (ignoring node-role.kubernetes.io/worker).

managedFunctions.name: fromSecret
managedFunctions.signature: func fromSecret(ns string, secretName string, datakey string) (dataValue string, err error)

returns.description: Empty string if the data key does not exist. Policy violation if the Secret itself is missing.

managedFunctions.description: Returns the value of the given data key in the Secret on the managed cluster at policy evaluation.

managedFunctions.name: fromConfigMap
managedFunctions.signature: func fromConfigMap(ns string, configmapName string, datakey string) (dataValue string, err Error)
managedFunctions.description: Returns the value of the given data key in the ConfigMap on the managed cluster.

managedFunctions.name: fromClusterClaim
managedFunctions.signature: func fromClusterClaim(clusterclaimName string) (dataValue string, err Error)
managedFunctions.description: Returns the value of Spec.Value in a ClusterClaim on the managed cluster. Policy violation if the ClusterClaim does not exist.

managedFunctions.name: lookupClusterClaim
managedFunctions.description: Like fromClusterClaim but returns empty string if the ClusterClaim is missing.

managedFunctions.name: lookup
managedFunctions.signature: func lookup(apiversion string, kind string, namespace string, name string, labelselector ...string) (value string, err Error)

returns.description: On managed cluster you can reference any resource.

managedFunctions.description: Looks up a resource on the managed cluster. No namespace restriction (unlike hub-side lookup).

managedFunctions.name: base64enc
managedFunctions.description: Returns a base64-encoded value of the input data string.

managedFunctions.name: base64dec
managedFunctions.description: Returns a base64-decoded value of the input string.

managedFunctions.name: indent
managedFunctions.signature: func indent(spaces int, data string) (padded-data string)
managedFunctions.description: Returns the data string padded with a specific number of leading spaces.

managedFunctions.name: autoindent
managedFunctions.description: Automatically indents pipeline output based on the column of the template directive.

managedFunctions.name: toInt
managedFunctions.description: Casts the input to int. Must be the last function in the pipeline.

managedFunctions.name: toBool
managedFunctions.description: Converts the input string to a boolean. Must be the last function in the pipeline.

managedFunctions.name: fromYaml
managedFunctions.description: Parses a YAML string into a Golang object. Also available as fromYAML.

managedFunctions.name: toYaml
managedFunctions.description: Serializes a Golang object to a YAML string. Also available as toYAML.

managedFunctions.name: fromYAML
managedFunctions.description: Alias for fromYaml.

managedFunctions.name: toYAML
managedFunctions.description: Alias for toYaml.

managedFunctions.name: toLiteral
managedFunctions.description: Removes outer quotation marks from the template result, converting JSON strings to YAML-native values.

managedFunctions.name: copySecretData
managedFunctions.signature: func copySecretData(namespace string, name string) (data map[string]string)
managedFunctions.description: Copies all of the data contents of the specified Secret.

managedFunctions.name: copyConfigMapData
managedFunctions.signature: func copyConfigMapData(namespace string, name string) (data map[string]string)
managedFunctions.description: Copies all of the data content of the specified ConfigMap.

managedFunctions.name: getNodesWithExactRoles
managedFunctions.description: Returns a list of nodes with only the role you specify (ignoring node-role.kubernetes.io/worker).

managedFunctions.name: hasNodesWithExactRoles
managedFunctions.description: Returns true if the cluster contains nodes with only the specified role (ignoring worker).

managedFunctions.name: skipObject
managedFunctions.description: Managed-only. Available in ConfigurationPolicy resources. Signals to skip a particular object for the policy. Use inside a conditional or with an optional boolean argument. Combines with objectSelector to filter further by name.

sprigFunctions.name: htpasswd
sprigFunctions.description: Generates an htpasswd entry. Category: Cryptographic and security.

sprigFunctions.name: date
sprigFunctions.description: Formats a date. Category: Date.

sprigFunctions.name: mustToDate
sprigFunctions.description: Parses a date string; errors if invalid. Category: Date.

sprigFunctions.name: now
sprigFunctions.description: Current time. Category: Date.

sprigFunctions.name: toDate
sprigFunctions.description: Parses a date string; returns zero value on error. Category: Date.

sprigFunctions.name: default
sprigFunctions.description: Returns default if value is empty. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: empty
sprigFunctions.description: True for zero values. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: fromJson
sprigFunctions.description: Parses a JSON string. Also aliased to fromJSON. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: mustFromJson
sprigFunctions.description: Parses JSON; errors on invalid input. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: ternary
sprigFunctions.signature: ternary(ifTrue any, ifFalse any, test bool) any
sprigFunctions.description: Branch on a boolean. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: toJson
sprigFunctions.description: Serializes to compact JSON. Also aliased to toJSON. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: toRawJson
sprigFunctions.description: Like toJson but escapes newlines so they do not affect YAML structure. Use with multi-line strings such as certificates. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: mustToRawJson
sprigFunctions.description: toRawJson that errors on failure. Category: Default.

sprigFunctions.name: fromJSON
sprigFunctions.description: Alias for fromJson. Parses a JSON string.

sprigFunctions.name: mustFromJSON
sprigFunctions.description: Alias for mustFromJson.

sprigFunctions.name: toJSON
sprigFunctions.description: Alias for toJson.

sprigFunctions.name: toRawJSON
sprigFunctions.description: Alias for toRawJson.

sprigFunctions.name: mustToRawJSON
sprigFunctions.description: Alias for mustToRawJson.

sprigFunctions.name: dict
sprigFunctions.description: Builds a map from alternating key/value pairs. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: dig
sprigFunctions.signature: dig(keys ...string, default any, dict map[string]any) any
sprigFunctions.description: Deep lookup into a nested map with a default. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: get
sprigFunctions.description: Map lookup. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: hasKey
sprigFunctions.description: Map key presence check. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: keys
sprigFunctions.description: Keys of one or more maps. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: merge
sprigFunctions.description: Merges src maps into dst; dst wins on conflict. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: mustMerge
sprigFunctions.description: merge that errors on failure. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: set
sprigFunctions.signature: set(dict map[string]any, key string, value any) map[string]any
sprigFunctions.description: Sets a key in a map. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: unset
sprigFunctions.description: Removes a key from a map. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: values
sprigFunctions.description: Values of a map. Category: Dictionaries.

sprigFunctions.name: b64dec
sprigFunctions.description: Base64-decodes a string. Category: Encoding.

sprigFunctions.name: b64enc
sprigFunctions.description: Base64-encodes a string. Category: Encoding.

sprigFunctions.name: fail
sprigFunctions.description: Aborts template rendering with a message. Category: Flow control.

sprigFunctions.name: add
sprigFunctions.description: Integer addition. Category: Integer math.

sprigFunctions.name: mul
sprigFunctions.description: Integer multiplication. Category: Integer math.

sprigFunctions.name: div
sprigFunctions.description: Integer division. Category: Integer math.

sprigFunctions.name: round
sprigFunctions.description: Rounds a float. Category: Integer math.

sprigFunctions.name: sub
sprigFunctions.description: Integer subtraction. Category: Integer math.

sprigFunctions.name: until
sprigFunctions.description: Integer range [0,n). Category: Integer slice.

sprigFunctions.name: untilStep
sprigFunctions.signature: untilStep(start int, stop int, step int) []int
sprigFunctions.description: Integer range with step. Category: Integer slice.

sprigFunctions.name: append
sprigFunctions.description: Appends an item to a list. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: has
sprigFunctions.description: List membership. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: list
sprigFunctions.description: Creates a list. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: mustAppend
sprigFunctions.description: append that errors on failure. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: mustHas
sprigFunctions.description: has that errors on failure. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: mustPrepend
sprigFunctions.description: prepend that errors on failure. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: mustSlice
sprigFunctions.signature: mustSlice(list []any, start int, end int) ([]any, error)
sprigFunctions.description: slice that errors on failure. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: prepend
sprigFunctions.description: Prepends an item to a list. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: slice
sprigFunctions.description: Sublist. Category: Lists.

sprigFunctions.name: concat
sprigFunctions.description: Concatenates lists. Category: String lists.

sprigFunctions.name: join
sprigFunctions.description: Joins list items with separator. Category: String lists.

sprigFunctions.name: sortAlpha
sprigFunctions.description: Alphabetical sort. Category: String lists.

sprigFunctions.name: split
sprigFunctions.description: Splits on separator; returns map keyed _0, _1, ... Category: String lists.

sprigFunctions.name: splitn
sprigFunctions.signature: splitn(sep string, n int, s string) map[string]string
sprigFunctions.description: split with max n parts. Category: String lists.

sprigFunctions.name: splitList
sprigFunctions.description: Splits on separator; returns list. Category: String lists.

sprigFunctions.name: cat
sprigFunctions.description: Concatenates args as strings with spaces. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: contains
sprigFunctions.description: Substring check. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: hasPrefix
sprigFunctions.description: Prefix check. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: hasSuffix
sprigFunctions.description: Suffix check. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: lower
sprigFunctions.description: Lowercase. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: mustRegexFind
sprigFunctions.description: First regex match; errors on invalid pattern. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: mustRegexFindAll
sprigFunctions.signature: mustRegexFindAll(pattern string, s string, n int) ([]string, error)
sprigFunctions.description: All regex matches; errors on invalid pattern. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: mustRegexMatch
sprigFunctions.description: Regex match check; errors on invalid pattern. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: quote
sprigFunctions.description: Wraps value in double quotes. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: regexFind
sprigFunctions.description: First regex match. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: regexFindAll
sprigFunctions.signature: regexFindAll(pattern string, s string, n int) []string
sprigFunctions.description: All regex matches. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: regexMatch
sprigFunctions.description: Regex match check. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: regexQuoteMeta
sprigFunctions.description: Escapes regex metacharacters. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: replace
sprigFunctions.signature: replace(old string, new string, s string) string
sprigFunctions.description: Replaces all occurrences of old with new. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: substr
sprigFunctions.signature: substr(start int, length int, s string) string
sprigFunctions.description: Substring. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: trim
sprigFunctions.description: Trims whitespace. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: trimAll
sprigFunctions.description: Trims any character in cutset. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: trunc
sprigFunctions.description: Truncates to n characters. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: upper
sprigFunctions.description: Uppercase. Category: Strings.

sprigFunctions.name: semver
sprigFunctions.description: Parses a semver string. Category: Version comparison.

sprigFunctions.name: semverCompare
sprigFunctions.description: Checks a version against a semver constraint. Category: Version comparison.

hubExportedValues.name: .ManagedClusterName
hubExportedValues.description: Name of the target cluster where the policy is propagated.

hubExportedValues.name: .ManagedClusterLabels
hubExportedValues.description: Map of keys and values of the labels on the managed cluster where the policy is propagated.

hubExportedValues.name: .PolicyMetadata
hubExportedValues.description: Map with the name, namespace, labels, and annotations keys, with values from the root policy.

managedExportedValues.name: .ObjectName
managedExportedValues.description: Name of the selected object from the objectSelector or metadata.name that you specified. Available inside objectDefinition for ConfigurationPolicy.

managedExportedValues.name: .ObjectNamespace
managedExportedValues.description: Name of the selected namespace from spec.namespaceSelector or metadata.namespace that you specified. Applies when the object is not cluster-scoped. Available inside objectDefinition for ConfigurationPolicy.

managedExportedValues.name: .Object
managedExportedValues.description: Full target object currently on the cluster. Available inside objectDefinition for ConfigurationPolicy.
